intro: Across fifteen years at Jahangirnagar University — and as part-time faculty at North South University — Dr. Snigdha teaches at both undergraduate and graduate level, supervising MSS and MPhil theses in gender, sexuality, and medical anthropology.

items.title: Anthropology of Gender & Sexuality
items.detail: Foundational theory and ethnography of gender, sexuality, and the politics of difference.

items.title: Medical Anthropology
items.detail: Health, the body, care, and the governance of populations in South Asian contexts.

items.title: Ethnographic Research Methods
items.detail: Fieldwork design, participant observation, reflexivity, and writing ethnography.

items.title: Masculinity & Queer Studies
items.detail: Hijra and transgender lives, hegemonic masculinities, and the anthropology of recognition.

items.title: Feminist Theory & Anthropology
items.detail: Feminist epistemologies and their application to the study of society and the self.

items.title: Contemporary Politics, Religion & Society
items.detail: Religion, media, and political change in contemporary Bangladesh.
